base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of birdo_variants — a character (boss) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Birdo — recurring mini-boss at end of most worlds. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Birdo — recurring mini-boss at end of most worlds; fires eggs/fireballs. 3 palette-tiers (pink/red/green) with different projectile behavior. 528×166 sheet
